name: Insightly CRM API
what_it_does: Insightly REST API for CRM and project management platform. Enables AI agents to manage contacts and organizations, track leads and opportunities, manage projects and tasks, access email activity, and integrate Insightly CRM data into marketing and business workflow automation. Insightly combines CRM with lightweight project management, targeting SMB and mid-market.
use_cases: Managing contacts, leads, and opportunities from sales automation agents
Tracking project milestones and task completion from project management agents
Retrieving pipeline and sales forecast data from revenue analytics agents
Integrating Insightly CRM data into marketing automation and email workflow agents
not_for: Large enterprise CRM needs (Insightly targets SMB/mid-market)
Pure project management without CRM component
best_when: An SMB using Insightly for CRM and project management wants AI agents to automate contact management, track deals, and sync CRM data with marketing and project workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer contact data and sales interactions are personal data. GDPR compliance required for EU contacts.

auth.notes: Insightly API uses API key as password in HTTP Basic auth (username left blank). API key available in Insightly user settings. Simple but lacks granular access control.

pricing.paid_tiers: Plus, Professional, and Enterprise plans scaling users and records
pricing.notes: Affordable SMB CRM + project management pricing. API available on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: 10 requests per second per API key

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer CRM data requires GDPR compliance
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth
API key used as Basic auth password — avoid logging auth headers
10 req/sec rate limit — implement back-off for bulk import/export operations
No webhooks — must poll for contact and opportunity changes
US-only data residency — EU companies must assess compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer CRM data. SOC2, GDPR. API key as Basic auth password — log sanitization required. No granular scope control. US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer CRM data. SOC2, GDPR. API key as Basic auth — log sanitization critical. No scope control.
